# Mark A. Lane - Gaffer & Lighting Technician

> Professional Gaffer and Chief Lighting Technician based in London, UK. Specialising in high-end Narrative, Commercial, and Music Video lighting.

## About

Mark A. Lane is a London-based Gaffer and Chief Lighting Technician with over nine years of experience. He has worked with award-winning Cinematographers and Directors on projects of every scale, prioritising quality and safety above all else. Supported by a dedicated team and a reliable network of suppliers, he handles any brief or budget with a results-driven approach.

## Services

- Gaffing for Narrative Film and TV
- Commercial and Advertising Lighting
- Music Video Lighting
- Chief Lighting Technician services
- Lighting equipment coordination via Panalux, SHL London, MBSE, TFR

## Credits

- Gaffer
- Chief Lighting Technician
- London Commercial Gaffer

## Recognition

- BAFTA Longlist - 22+1 British Short Film (2026)
- EDMAs Nominated - Tonight, Music Video of the Year (2026)
- BSC Club - Flock, Cinematography (2025)
- BIFA Nominated - Flock, Best British Short Film (2025)
- UKMVA Nominated - Tonight, Best Pop Video UK (2025)
- UKMVA Nominated - Baxter Dury, Best Alt Newcomer (2025)
- TellyCast DVAs - Van Wife, Best Digital Commercial (2024)
- BSC Short Film Awards - Tapeworm, Best Short Film (2024)
